title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Porter - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Porter - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Porter. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
